tasks.label: Start MySQL (docker)
tasks.//: Host-only: starts the local `mysql8` container. In a devcontainer MySQL runs as the compose `mysql` service (started automatically via depends_on), and there is no docker CLI in the container — so skip there instead of erroring.
tasks.command: if [ -n "$REMOTE_CONTAINERS$CODESPACES" ] || ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Devcontainer: MySQL runs as the compose service (no action needed).'; else docker start mysql8; fi
